stemHtml: GPS employs two frequencies, L1 and L2, to offer Standard Positioning Service (SPS) and Precise Positioning Service (PPS). L1 is essential for delivering...

options.a: PPS using only the C/A code, while SPS requires both the C/A code and the P code transmitted on L1 and L2.
options.b: SPS using only the C/A code, while PPS requires the P code, which is transmitted on both L1 and L2.
options.c: PPS using both the C/A code and the P code, while SPS requires the C/A code transmitted on L2.
options.d: SPS using the P code, while PPS requires both the C/A code and the P code transmitted on L1 and L2.
